resources.string: Please choose a valid phone number
Use the back button to exit the map
This contact has no valid phone numbers !
Add contacts by clicking on the \'+\' button
An error occurred while trying to delete %1$s
Deleting this contact from \'SMS Finder\' will delete all of its info. You can always add them back !

Xiaomi phone detected! For this app to work properly you must allow it to execute in the background. To do this, go to the \"Security\" app, then to the \"Manage apps\" tab, then to the \"Automatic startup\" one and check \"SMS Finder\"
